semantic_style.core_concept: NYC Street Grid meets High-End Magazine
semantic_style.visual_metaphor: City Blocks & Building Blocks. Structured grids, vertical rhythm, concrete textures mixed with warm human moments.

heading.usage_rules: Use Light for elegance (large hero text). Use Black for impact (section headers). Avoid 'Medium' or 'Regular' for headings to maintain contrast.

body.usage_rules: High legibility. increase line-height to 1.7 for editorial feel.

layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol. Use 'grid-cols-12' for complex layouts. Mix spanning columns (col-span-4, col-span-8).

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-none h-12 px-8 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-input hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-none h-12 px-8 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-none h-10 px-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold transition-all

cards.blog_card: group relative overflow-hidden bg-card border border-border/50 hover:border-primary/20 transition-all duration-500
cards.feature_card: p-8 border border-border bg-gradient-to-br from-white to-gray-50/50

inputs.style: h-12 rounded-none border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

visual_enhancers.texture: Add a subtle 'noise' overlay (opacity 0.03) to the entire app to give it a print/magazine feel.
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-[0_1px_2px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] for cards. No heavy drop shadows.
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide React icons only. Stroke width 1.5px. No emojis.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME OVERHAUL: Replace the 'Rainbow' aesthetic with the 'Metropolitan Editorial' theme. Remove all 'rainbow-letter' classes and multi-colored borders.
2. COLOR UPDATE: Update tailwind.config.js with the new color palette. Remove the 'b4b-*' rainbow colors and replace them with the brand colors (taxi_yellow, subway_green, etc.).
3. TYPOGRAPHY: Update index.css. Ensure headings use 'Outfit' but with refined weights (Light or Black, avoid Regular). Body uses 'DM Sans'.
4. COMPONENTS: Refactor 'BlogCard' to be cleaner, using the new border/shadow style. Remove emoji icons from Category pills and replace with Lucide icons.
5. NAVBAR: Make it sticky with a glassmorphism effect (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80). Use a simple, bold text logo 'BLOGS 4 BLOCKS' in black/dark charcoal.
6. HERO SECTION: Redesign Home Hero. Use the 'hero_background' image with a subtle overlay. Large, editorial typography. Search bar should be 'elevated' (minimalist, high contrast).
7. ICONS: Replace all emoji icons with Lucide-React icons. Example: 'Briefcase' for Career, 'Megaphone' for Marketing, 'TrendingUp' for Analytics.
8. TEXTURES: Add a global noise texture overlay if possible (using a fixed div with pointer-events-none).
9. DATA-TESTID: Ensure all buttons and inputs have data-testid attributes.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts
Sonner component are located in '/app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx'
